name: DMAIC Ontology (Six Sigma DMAIC)
description: Six Sigma DMAIC process improvement ontology for modelling the standard 8-24 week project-based methodology with full statistical rigour — SIPOC scoping, CTQ trees, Gage R&R measurement system analysis, process capability (Cp/Cpk/sigma/DPMO), root cause analysis with hypothesis testing, design of experiments (DOE), and SPC control plans

components.sixSigmaProject: DMAIC project charter, sigma tracking, and phase progression
components.criticalToQuality: VOC-driven CTQ tree with specification limits (USL/LSL/target)
components.processCapability: Sigma level, Cp, Cpk, Pp, Ppk, DPMO, yield tracking
components.experiment: DOE factorial design, factor optimisation, interaction analysis
components.controlPlan: SPC chart monitoring (8 chart types), control limits, reaction plans

domain: Six Sigma, DMAIC, Statistical Process Control
notes: Six Sigma DMAIC ontology — standard 8-24 week project-based variant with full statistical rigour. Companion to K-DMAIC-ONT (compressed 3-5 day Kaizen blitz variant). Imports PE-ONT v4.0.0 for Process, ProcessMetric, AIAgent, Skill, Hypothesis, ProcessPattern cross-ontology bridges.
